description_long: This coatrack features a modern, sculptural design with three spherical knobs arranged vertically along a gently curving central stem. The stem rises from a sturdy, circular base, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. Each sphere is evenly spaced, offering multiple points for hanging coats, hats, or bags. The smooth, unadorned surfaces and uniform color give it a minimalist appearance, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or public waiting areas. The overall structure is freestanding and appears to be constructed from a solid, durable material, likely metal or a high-quality composite. There are no visible decorative embellishments, focusing on function and form.
description: A modern, freestanding coatrack with three spherical knobs on a curving stem and a round base, finished in a smooth, uniform color.
description_view_0: Curved stem with three spherical knobs is clearly visible, showing the dynamic, wavy profile.
description_view_1: Front view reveals the vertical alignment of the spheres and the circular base, with the stem appearing straight.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the curving stem and staggered spheres are prominent, emphasizing the sculptural form.
description_view_3: Direct rear view with all three spheres aligned vertically, stem appears straight, and the base is fully visible.
